entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. being studied for drought tolerance

entities.description: A yield limiting factor characterized by periodic water scarcity

entities.description: Experimental condition with optimal water availability

entities.description: Experimental condition simulating intermittent drought

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pods produced by the groundnut plant

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the vegetative part of the groundnut plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of pod yield to total biomass

entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the lines and the water treatment

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-YEAR EFFECTS
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the lines and the year of study

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze genotype and environment interactions

entities.name: POD GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of growth of the pods under water stress

entities.name: PARTITION
entities.description: The distribution of biomass within the plant under water stress

entities.name: SCMR
entities.description: Shoot Canopy Moisture Retention, used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: SLA, used as a surrogate for drought tolerance

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method for improving crop traits using markers

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SELECTION
